text: Kal raat papa se mere 5th UPSC attempt ko lekar bohot gandi bahas hui, unhone seedha keh diya ki ab aur padhai nahi hogi aur rishta pakka kiya jayega. Main unhe samjhana chahti thi ki meri preparation solid hai, par joint family ke samne baap se aawaz oonchi karke unki izzat mitti me nahi mila sakti thi. Apne saare armaan dabakar maine subah unhe chai dete waqt bol diya ki jahan aap theek samjhein wahan shadi kar lungi.

Kal raat Delhi me mere room par papa ka phone aaya tha aur unhone ultimatum de diya ki PSC ki taiyari chhod kar gaon aao aur family dukan sambhalo. Maine thoda virodh kiya toh unhone sunaya ki mera coaching ka kharcha ab unke liye bojh ban gaya hai aur samaj me naak kat rahi hai. Gussa aur frustration bohot tha, par 'log kya kahenge' ki darr se aur unka BP na badhe ye soch kar, maine khamoshi se apni wapasi ki ticket book karwa li hai.

28 saal ka ho gaya hoon aur eternal dropper ke taano se thak kar kal raat maine papa se private job start karne ki baat ki thi jisse bahas shuru ho gayi. Unhone gusse me keh diya ki 'sarkari naukri' ke alawa kuch kiya toh samaj me unhe muh dikhane layak nahi chhodunga aur wo mujhse rishta tod lenge. Meri halat kharab hai coaching institute ke akelepan me, par unki izzat aur zidd ko bachane ke liye main dobara kitabein khol kar baith gaya hoon, chahe andar se ghut kyu na raha hoon.

Kal raat papa ke sath state PCS ke form bharne par jhagda hua tha, wo zidd par ade hain ki main wahi optional subject lun jo mama ke bete ne liya tha. Mera pichle 4 saal ka base alag hai par jab unhone chillakar kaha ki mere fail hone se khandaan me unki izzat nilam ho rahi hai, toh meri aawaz band ho gayi. Unse baap-bete ka rishta na toote aur ghar me kalesh na ho, isliye maine bina kuch soche unke bataye hue subject se form bhar diya hai.

Kal raat papa se Delhi jaakar mains ki test series join karne par aakhiri baar bahas hui jo bina nateeje ke chhut gayi. Wo joint family ke darr se ek akeli ladki ko bahar nahi bhejna chahte kyunki padosi aur rishtedaar baatein banayenge. Mujhe pata hai yahan gaon me rehkar rank nahi aayegi, par ghar me kalesh rokne aur papa ka maan rakhne ke liye maine muskurate hue bol diya ki main yahin reh kar self-study kar lungi.
